content.query:
--DROP EXTERNAL TABLE M3.ODLINE
CREATE VIEW M3.ODLINE AS
SELECT * FROM M3.ODLINE_PAR
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM M3.ODLINE_ARC

--DROP VIEW M3.ODLINE_ARC AS
CREATE VIEW M3.ODLINE_ARC AS 
SELECT 
	CONVERT(bigint,[CONO]) [CONO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DIVI]) [DIVI],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ORNO]) [ORNO],
	CONVERT(bigint,[PONR]) [PONR],
	CONVERT(bigint,[POSX]) [POSX],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DLIX]) [DLIX],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[FACI]) [FACI],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[WHLO]) [WHLO],
	CONVERT(bigint,[LTYP]) [LTYP],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ITNO]) [ITNO],
	CONVERT(float,[DLQT]) [DLQT],
	CONVERT(float,[DLQA]) [DLQA],
	CONVERT(float,[DLQS]) [DLQS],
	CONVERT(float,[IVQT]) [IVQT],
	CONVERT(float,[IVQA]) [IVQA],
	CONVERT(float,[IVQS]) [IVQS],
	CONVERT(float,[CHQT]) [CHQT],
	CONVERT(float,[SAPR]) [SAPR],
	CONVERT(float,[NEPR]) [NEPR],
	CONVERT(bigint,[SACD]) [SACD],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[PRMO]) [PRMO],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DIC1]) [DIC1],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DIC2]) [DIC2],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DIC3]) [DIC3],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DIC4]) [DIC4],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DIC5]) [DIC5],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DIC6]) [DIC6],
	CONVERT(float,[DIP1]) [DIP1],
	CONVERT(float,[DIP2]) [DIP2],
	CONVERT(float,[DIP3]) [DIP3],
	CONVERT(float,[DIP4]) [DIP4],
	CONVERT(float,[DIP5]) [DIP5],
	CONVERT(float,[DIP6]) [DIP6],
	CONVERT(float,[DIA1]) [DIA1],
	CONVERT(float,[DIA2]) [DIA2],
	CONVERT(float,[DIA3]) [DIA3],
	CONVERT(float,[DIA4]) [DIA4],
	CONVERT(float,[DIA5]) [DIA5],
	CONVERT(float,[DIA6]) [DIA6],
	CONVERT(float,[LNAM]) [LNAM],
	CONVERT(bigint,[STCD]) [STCD],
	CONVERT(bigint,[PRCH]) [PRCH],
	CONVERT(float,[UCOS]) [UCOS],
	CONVERT(bigint,[UCCD]) [UCCD],
	CONVERT(float,[DCOS]) [DCOS],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ALUN]) [ALUN],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[SPUN]) [SPUN],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CMNO]) [CMNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[SUNO]) [SUNO],
	CONVERT(bigint,[PRTX]) [PRTX],
	CONVERT(bigint,[POTX]) [POTX],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DTID]) [DTID],
	CONVERT(float,[INPR]) [INPR],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CUCT]) [CUCT],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[HDPR]) [HDPR],
	CONVERT(bigint,[IVNO]) [IVNO],
	CONVERT(bigint,[YEA4]) [YEA4],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CUOR]) [CUOR],
	CONVERT(bigint,[PRPR]) [PRPR],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[PROJ]) [PROJ],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ELNO]) [ELNO],
	CONVERT(date,[RGDT]) [RGDT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[RGTM]) [RGTM],
	CONVERT(date,[LMDT]) [LMDT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[CHNO]) [CHNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CHID]) [CHID],
	CONVERT(float,[RTQA]) [RTQA],
	CONVERT(float,[RTQT]) [RTQT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[APBA]) [APBA],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[WATP]) [WATP],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[GWTP]) [GWTP],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[INPX]) [INPX],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[EXIN]) [EXIN],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[PIDE]) [PIDE],
	CONVERT(float,[PCLA]) [PCLA],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DECU]) [DECU],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[TEPY]) [TEPY],
	CONVERT(float,[DPCL]) [DPCL],
	CONVERT(float,[SCLB]) [SCLB],
	CONVERT(bigint,[LNCL]) [LNCL],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[RAGN]) [RAGN],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CLAT]) [CLAT],
	CONVERT(float,[CAWE]) [CAWE],
	CONVERT(float,[CHQS]) [CHQS],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[MIGI]) [MIGI],
	TRY_CONVERT(datetime2(7),[LMTS]) [LMTS],
	CONVERT(bigint,[CLRT]) [CLRT],
	CONVERT(float,[CICW]) [CICW],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ISUN]) [ISUN],
	CONVERT(float,[DAMT]) [DAMT],
	CONVERT(float,[DVAT]) [DVAT]
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3P/ODLINE_ARC.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
